WildWest.name: Wild Wasteland
sweety.name: Sweety
patch_pet.name: Patch
boom.name: Boom
Bull.name: Bull
candy.name: Candy
snake.name: Snake

enemy.Cherry.name: Cherry
enemy.Cherry.description: An enemy that spoils combat items and heals from junk on the board.
enemy.Cherry.stage.main.name: Ripe Threat
enemy.Cherry.ultimate.trashHeal.name: Junk Feeding
enemy.Cherry.ultimate.trashHeal.descript: Heals for all {item:trash_1} {item:trash_2} {item:trash_3} on the board.
enemy.Fireman.name: Fireman
enemy.Fireman.description: An enemy that turns ordinary weapons into flame barrels.
enemy.Fireman.stage.main.name: Fire Alarm
enemy.Fireman.ultimate.flameDamage.name: Flame Burst
enemy.Fireman.ultimate.flameDamage.descr: Deals damage for each {item:flame} on the board. Damage: {item:flame} x2.
enemy.Toxxy.name: Toxxy
enemy.Toxxy.description: An enemy that turns ordinary weapons into chemical barrels.
enemy.Toxxy.stage.main.name: Chemical Alarm
enemy.Toxxy.ultimate.chemicalDamage.name: Chemical Burst
enemy.Toxxy.ultimate.chemicalDamage.desc: Deals damage for each {item:chemical} on the board. Damage: {item:chemical} x2.
enemy.Venom.name: Venom
enemy.Venom.description: An enemy that turns ordinary weapons into radioactive barrels.
enemy.Venom.stage.main.name: Radioactive Alarm
enemy.Venom.ultimate.radioactiveDamage.d: Deals damage for each {item:radioactive} on the board. Damage: {item:radioactive} x2.
enemy.Foxy.name: Foxy
enemy.Foxy.description: An enemy that turns weapons into bandages and upgrades bandages on the board.
enemy.Foxy.stage.main.name: Clever Dressing
enemy.Foxy.ultimate.bandageHeal.name: Bandage Feeding
enemy.Foxy.ultimate.bandageHeal.descript: Heals for all {item:Bandage} {item:Bandage_power} on the board.
enemy.Cookie.name: Cookie
enemy.Cookie.description: An enemy that turns combat weapons into ordinary trash during rage.
enemy.Cookie.stage.main.name: Crumbly Trouble
enemy.Cookie.ultimate.weaponToTrash.name: Trash Crumbs
enemy.Cookie.ultimate.weaponToTrash.desc: Turns {item:granate} {item:Knife} {item:bullet} on the board into {item:trash_1} or {item:trash_2}.
enemy.Rusty.name: Rusty
enemy.Rusty.description: An enemy that punishes the player for trash on the board.
enemy.Rusty.stage.main.name: Rusty Raid
enemy.Rusty.ultimate.trashDamage.name: Rusty Trash
enemy.Rusty.ultimate.trashDamage.descrip: Deals damage for each {item:trash_1} {item:trash_2} {item:trash_3} on the board.
enemy.Sweety.name: Sweety
enemy.Sweety.description: An enemy that turns grenades and knives into bullets, then sometimes upgrades bullets.
enemy.Sweety.stage.main.name: Sweet Barrage
enemy.Sweety.ultimate.bulletDamage.name: Bullet Payback
enemy.Sweety.ultimate.bulletDamage.descr: Deals damage for each {item:bullet} {item:bullet_power} on the board.
enemy.Candy.name: Candy
enemy.Candy.description: An enemy that turns grenades and bullets into knives, then sometimes upgrades knives.
enemy.Candy.stage.main.name: Sweet Cut
enemy.Candy.ultimate.knifeDamage.name: Knife Payback
enemy.Candy.ultimate.knifeDamage.descrip: Deals damage for each {item:Knife} {item:Knife_power} on the board.
enemy.boom.name: boom
enemy.boom.description: An enemy that turns knives and bullets into grenades, then sometimes upgrades grenades.
enemy.boom.stage.main.name: Explosive Setup
enemy.boom.ultimate.knifeDamage.name: Knife Counter
enemy.boom.ultimate.knifeDamage.descript: Deals damage for each {item:Knife} {item:Knife_power} on the board.
enemy.Bully.name: Bully
enemy.Bully.description: An enemy that turns weapons into shields, upgrades shields, and restores protection with rage.
enemy.Bully.stage.main.name: Shield Push
enemy.Bully.ultimate.shieldRestore.name: Shield Nerve
enemy.Bully.ultimate.shieldRestore.descr: Restores shield for each {item:Shield} {item:Shield_power} on the board.
enemy.Rocket.name: Rocket
enemy.Rocket.description: An enemy that ruins shields and bandages by turning them into junk, then explodes with rage.
enemy.Rocket.stage.main.name: Rocket Windup
enemy.Rocket.ultimate.kamikaze.name: Kamikaze
enemy.Rocket.ultimate.kamikaze.descripti: Deals damage to the player equal to the enemy's current health, then the enemy explodes for the same amount.
enemy.Boss_1.description: A staged boss used to test future match-3 combat rules.
enemy.Boss_1.stage.windup.name: Windup
enemy.Boss_1.stage.storm.name: Storm
enemy.Boss_1.stage.hurricane.name: Hurricane
enemy.Boss_1.ultimate.dustToBandage.name: Dust Medicine
enemy.Boss_1.ultimate.dustToBandage.desc: Turns all {item:trash_1} {item:trash_2} {item:trash_3} on the board into {item:Bandage}.
enemy.Boss_1.ultimate.bandageHeal.name: Greedy Healing
enemy.Boss_1.ultimate.bandageHeal.descri: Heals for each {item:Bandage} {item:Bandage_power} on the board.
enemy.Boss_1.ultimate.shieldRestore.name: Greedy Shield
enemy.Boss_1.ultimate.shieldRestore.desc: Restores shield for each {item:Shield} {item:Shield_power} on the board.
enemy.Boss_1.ultimate.kamikaze.name: Kamikaze
enemy.Boss_1.ultimate.kamikaze.descripti: Deals damage to the player equal to the enemy's current health, then the enemy explodes for the same amount.
enemy.Boss_1.ultimate.grenadePunish.name: Blast Tax
enemy.Boss_1.ultimate.grenadePunish.desc: Deals damage for each {item:granate} {item:granate_power} on the board, then turns {item:granate} into {item:trash_1} {item:trash_2}.
enemy.Boss_1.ultimate.frozenField.name: Frozen Field
enemy.Boss_1.ultimate.frozenField.descri: Freezes random items and heals from {item:trash_1} {item:trash_2} {item:trash_3} on the board.
trader.text_01: Hey, traveler. I have useful goods, if your gold is too shy.
trader.text_02: Rare stock, fair prices. Mostly fair.
healer.text_01: Sit closer to the fire. Wounds do not stitch themselves.
healer.text_02: I can get you standing again, but medicine is costly these days.
reward.gold.text_01: You found a small stash of gold.
reward.item.text_01: Something useful waits among the dust.
healer.paidThanks: Here is the payment for healing: {price}.
events.heal.title: Healing
ui.purchase.question: Make purchase?
surrender.question: Running already, puppy?
menu.title: Wild Wasteland
log.validationPassed: Data check passed: {maps} map config(s), {languages} locale(s).
log.mapGenerated: Map generated: {map}. Levels: {levels}, nodes per level: {min}-{max}.
log.healOpened: Healer at {node}: restores {amount} HP, price {price}, HP {current}/{max}.
events.shop.title: Trader
dialog.sweety.hello: Hello, traveler. The road is moody today, but I know a few ways around it.
dialog.sweety.hint: Sometimes a conversation opens the path better than a bullet. Sometimes, naturally, the opposite.
dialog.patchPet.hello: A small brass fox trots out of the dust, checks the road twice, and taps a tiny route note. It seems built for careful steps and useful discoveries.
dialog.patchPet.notes: Patch keeps a neat little checklist: local paths, clear logs, no mystery shortcuts. Then it wags at two marked places on the map.
level.1.text: You are at the beginning of the road.
level.2.text: You learned enough to claim a small prize.
level.3.text: Experience settles into a useful habit.
level.4.text: You have reached the current peak of training.
items.health.name: Health
items.health.description: Current and maximum health for this run.
items.exp.name: Experience
items.exp.description: Total experience and progress toward the next level.
items.Bandage.name: Bandage
items.Bandage.description:
Improves healing from {item:Bandage} by 1,
 improves healing from {item:Bandage_power} by 2.
items.Bandage_power.name: Power Bandage
items.battary.name: Battery
items.battary.description: Combine it with a neighboring item to activate all items of that type without aggression. Combine two batteries to activate the whole board.
items.bullet.name: Bullet
items.bullet_power.name: Power Bullet
items.granate.name: Grenade
items.granate.description:
Improves damage from {item:granate} by 1,
 improves damage from {item:granate_power} by 2.
items.granate_power.name: Power Grenade
items.item_gold.name: Gold
items.item_gold.description: Currency used for traders and paid services.
items.item_skull.name: Skull
items.item_skull.description: A map item gained from rewards or bought from traders.
items.item_swap.name: Swap
items.item_swap.description: A map item reserved for future swap actions.
items.item_time.name: Clock
items.item_time.description: A map item reserved for future time actions.
items.red.name: Serum
items.green.name: Stimulator
items.Knife.name: Knife
items.Knife.description:
Improves damage from {item:Knife} by 1,
 improves damage from {item:Knife_power} by 2.
items.Knife_power.name: Power Knife
items.Shield.name: Shield
items.Shield.description:
Improves calm from {item:Shield} by 1,
 improves calm from {item:Shield_power} by 2.
items.Shield_power.name: Power Shield
items.trash_1.name: Junk
items.trash_1.description: A junk match-3 item with rough side effects.
items.trash_2.name: Junk
items.trash_2.description: A junk match-3 item with rough side effects.
items.trash_3.name: Junk
items.trash_3.description: A junk match-3 item with rough side effects.
items.radioactive.name: Radioactive charge
items.radioactive.description: A dangerous item that sharply raises aggression.
items.flame.name: Flame barrel
items.flame.description: A dangerous item that raises aggression and hurts the player after an ordinary move.
items.chemical.name: Chemical barrel
items.chemical.description: A dangerous item that raises aggression and hurts the player after an ordinary move.
battle.noMoves.title: NO AVAILABLE MOVES
battle.noMoves.body: No moves available. Press Shuffle to take damage equal to the enemy attack and shuffle the board.
battle.outcome.restartPending: Battle restart will be added in the next step.
battle.status.selectFirstCell: Choose a cell, then choose a neighboring cell to swap.
battle.status.cellSelected: Cell selected. Now choose a neighbor.
battle.status.newCellSelected: New cell selected. Swaps require a neighbor.
battle.status.boxBlocked: That cell is covered by a box.
battle.status.vinesBlocked: That cell is tangled in vines and cannot be used normally.
battle.reward.test: The enemy is down. Claim the spoils.
battle.reward.Boss_1: The storm has fallen. Take what remains.
battle.reward.Cherry: Cherry has fallen apart. Take what has not rotted yet.
battle.reward.Fireman: Fireman has gone quiet. Take the reward before everything lights up again.
battle.reward.Toxxy: Toxxy has settled into a poisonous cloud. Take the reward while the air is only technically unsafe.
battle.reward.Venom: Venom has stopped glowing with intent. Take the reward before the board starts clicking.
battle.reward.Foxy: Foxy has backed off. Take the reward before she wraps the whole fight back up.
battle.reward.Cookie: Cookie has crumbled. Take the reward before the crumbs become trash.
battle.reward.Rusty: Rusty has fallen apart into rust. Take the reward before the board fills with junk.
battle.reward.Sweety: Sweety has backed off. Take the reward before the bullets keep arguing.
battle.reward.Candy: Candy has backed off. Take the reward before the knives continue the conversation.
battle.reward.boom: boom has burned out. Take the reward while the grenades pretend nothing happened.
battle.reward.Bully: Bully has backed off. Take the reward before he builds another shield out of your patience.
battle.reward.Rocket: Rocket exploded and left loot behind. Surprisingly practical.
battle.reward.example: Victory in battle brought a reward.
